name: Harem Island
description:
For your holidays, you decided to go take a flight to a place called Harem Island. The place is absolutely amazing and exclusively inhabited by beautiful young women in bikinis who never saw a man before! 

**UPDATE**: Added some stuff! Should make a better experience.
(You've all been very patient with me so here is the bot requested by Natsu Kashii! I'm clearly not good at managing my time so the fault is on me for taking so long. I wanted to do a school setting but I didn't find a nice pic so I changed the idea a little bit, I hope you'll enjoy it nonetheless! I might do the school harem if this isn't what you wanted, consider this a beach episode. I'll also add the requests some of y'all left me to the list and make them ASAP. That's all for now, see you next time! Also, bottom right girl solos imo)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update):**
creator: Gamereros
